series_metadata.series_description: To notify the BMV of refusals and Automatic License Suspension(s). To document reasonable grounds to request blood, breath, or urine from a driver and to document DUI arrests without a test being offered when vehicles, plates, or drivers licenses are seized. (BMV-2255)

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: White Copy - Mail BMV within 48 hours. Green Copy - Forward court within 48 hours. Yellow Copy - with original copy of HP-7 and assumes same retention period. Pink Copy - Given defendant. ; Electronic: Yellow copy may be scanned and uploaded with original copy of HP-7 in e-Citation program
